accents.rendered_excerpt: You are allowed to feel like an imposter without treating the feeling as fact. ---  Take that recognition into the integration that follows.
You are allowed to put the phone in another room. The notifications will survive without you. ---  Let that land before the next story beat.

I spent years being good at performing fine while my chest kept the minutes. The performance was not dishonesty — it was what the job rewarded. What I needed was not a better mask; it was one honest signal I could trust
